'''Onigiri''' is a tasty food item that fills up 3.5 hunger points.

{{Item
| image = Onigiri.png
| id = onigiri
| type = Food
| Subtype = Rice
| Properties = Hunger points: 3.5/10
| stackable = 64
| Description = Also known as Rice Balls
}}

Your dog can also eat this, so don't be shy to share it with your furry pal!
==Obtaining==
===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe ''(shapeless)''
|-
|[[Rice Bowl]]+ Dried Kelp
|[[File:Onigiri crafting.png|408x408px]]
|}
==Usage==
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' to use the item.
==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.17.2.
*The hunger points were buffed from 2 to 3.5 in DTN 1.18.5
